name: Overnight Oats
steps: Combine oats, milk, yogurt, honey, and chia seeds in a jar or container.
Stir well, cover, and refrigerate overnight (or at least 4 hours).
Top with blueberries before serving. Eat cold or microwave 1-2 min.
notes: Swap blueberries for banana, strawberries, or any fruit. Add peanut butter for extra protein.
